creator: will@csociety.org
text:
On Mon, Dec 24, 2001 at 11:59:04AM -0500, Vivek Khera wrote:
> >>>>> "w" == will  <will@FreeBSD.org> writes:
> 
> w> I believe, but cannot confirm, that the handbook installs a symlink
> w> for both index and handbook .html to the index.  Therefore, can
> w> this PR be closed?
> 
> It would appear that it does now do so.  Go ahead and close it as far
> as I'm concerned.  Thanks.

No problem.  Sorry it took so long to deal with this PR.

-- 
wca
